details.test: Task 2: Order three cheapest cartridges under $250
Task 3: Select highest-flow equivalent product from category listing
Task 5: Buy three cheapest membrane-equivalent products under $350
Task 6: Compare three products and add one with widest range / highest max conductivity
Task 7: Prepare cart for small hotel equivalent (system + three salts)
Task 8: Keep only cheapest housing-equivalent product and set quantity to 4
